title: Agent handoff review
description: A comprehensive local review session covering text, choices, ranking, editable answers, custom options, defaults, and secrets.

groups.title: Context
groups.description: Help the agent understand the product and current decision.

fields.label: What is the current project context?
fields.default: Loopmark is a local human-input gate for AI Agents. The next pass should prioritize product-quality UI and clear output.

fields.label: Any precise implementation note for the agent?
fields.default:
stdout: final answers only
stderr: URL, logs, validation errors

groups.title: Preferences
groups.description: Capture product and design preferences as dense feedback.

fields.label: Which visual direction should the UI follow?

default.label: Paper Trail
default.description: Elegant document-like layout with quiet controls and strong typography.

options.label: Paper Trail
options.description: Elegant document-like layout with quiet controls and strong typography.

options.label: Compact Tool
options.description: Dense utility interface with less editorial spacing.

options.label: Plain Form
options.description: Simple native-feeling form with minimal styling.

fields.label: Which capabilities are required for this iteration?

default.label: Browser-level visual QA
default.description: Use screenshots to catch layout and typography issues.

options.label: Readable validation errors
options.description: Show path, cause, fix, and example when input JSON is invalid.

options.label: Secret file output
options.description: Write sensitive values to a local temporary file instead of stdout.

options.label: Ranking edits
options.description: Let users reorder, edit, and add ranked feedback items.

options.label: Browser-level visual QA
options.description: Use screenshots to catch layout and typography issues.

options.label: Cross-platform browser opening
options.description: Support macOS, Windows, and Linux local browser launch behavior.

options.label: Visual fidelity
options.description: Match the accepted Paper Trail concept more closely.

options.label: Protocol clarity
options.description: Keep JSON compact and errors agent-readable.

options.label: Meaningful test coverage
options.description: Protect schema, output, server lifecycle, and UI flows.

groups.title: Sensitive Information
groups.description: Verify secret handling without leaking values into stdout.

fields.label: Optional local API key or token
